summary: Iteration 20: UX Improvements and Event Corrections - All tests passed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested UX improvements including: 1) Prossimo Passo widget on Home page (working with enrollment-in-progress state), 2) Event seed data corrections (old events removed, new events added including recurring Atelier — Apericoaching), 3) Prerequisite badges on training courses, 4) Breadcrumbs on MyEnrollments, Profile, and CourseDetail pages, 5) Cross-linking between pages, 6) Sidebar active state highlighting for sub-pages. All features working correctly.

backend_events_api.details: GET /api/community/events returns 3 correct events: Core Quadrant Pro Training, Presentazione percorsi formativi 2026-2027, Atelier — Apericoaching. Old events removed.

backend_dashboard_api.details: GET /api/community/dashboard returns user_course_interests array and upcoming_events including recurring events

frontend_prossimo_passo_widget.details: Widget displays 'La tua iscrizione è in corso' with 'Riprendi iscrizione' button for admin user

frontend_events_display.details: Events section shows all 3 events correctly, Atelier shows 'Mensile' label and 'Appuntamento ricorrente' badge

frontend_prerequisite_badges.details: Course cards show 'Nessuno — aperto a tutti' for Core Coaching and prerequisite requirements for other courses

frontend_breadcrumbs.details: MyEnrollments: '← Il mio spazio', Profile: '← Il mio spazio', CourseDetail: '← Percorsi formativi'

frontend_cross_linking.details: MyEnrollments shows 'Torna alla scheda del percorso' links

frontend_empty_states.details: MyJourney shows 'Il tuo percorso inizia qui' with explore button

frontend_sidebar_highlighting.details: Percorsi formativi sidebar item highlighted when on /course/{id} pages
